message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.0 for release (closes #70)

301 commits since v0.1.64 including complete FrankenTUI rewrite,
analytics dashboard, new connectors, and extensive test improvements.
CHANGELOG already has the 0.2.0 entry. Release triggers on v0.2.0 tag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -865,7 +865,7 @@
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yam3","title":"A6.2: Enhanced match highlighting","description":"Improve search term highlighting with more conspicuous colors and bold styling.","notes":"**Current** (tui.rs:1166-1226):
```rust
spans.push(Span::styled(
    text[start..end].to_string(),
    base.patch(
        Style::default()
            .fg(palette.accent)  // Uses accent color
            .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
    ),
));
```

**Improvements**:
1. **Background highlight**: Add background color for matched text
2. **Distinct color**: Use high-contrast highlight color (e.g., yellow on dark bg)
3. **Underline option**: Add underline for extra emphasis
4. **Theme-aware**: Different highlight for dark/light themes

**New highlight style**:
```rust
Style::default()
    .fg(palette.highlight_fg)  // High contrast text
    .bg(palette.highlight_bg)  // Background color (e.g., dark yellow)
    .add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
```

**Add to ThemePalette**:
```rust
pub highlight_fg: Color,  // e.g., Black or dark text
pub highlight_bg: Color,  // e.g., Yellow or gold
```

**Files to modify**:
- src/ui/components/theme.rs: add highlight colors
- src/ui/tui.rs: update highlight_spans_owned

**Testing**:
- Verify highlights are highly visible
- Test dark and light themes
- Test with multiple matches in one line","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-28T22:00:00Z","updated_at":"2025-11-29T20:11:41.974599819Z","closed_at":"2025-11-29T20:11:41.974599819Z","external_ref":"bd-ab8b","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yam3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-sux.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:43:49Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yg2","title":"Status bar and toast notifications for semantic","description":"## Purpose
Visual feedback for semantic search state in TUI.

## Status Bar Elements
- Mode indicator: mode:LEX / mode:SEM / mode:SEM* / mode:HYB
- Download progress (when active): ⬇️ 45%
- Optional embedder info: emb:minilm

## Toast Notifications
- "Semantic search ready" - ML model becomes available
- "Semantic index rebuilt" - after index upgrade  
- "Download failed: {reason}" - on error with retry info
- "Using hash fallback" - when switching to hash mode

## Toast Behavior
- Auto-dismiss after 3 seconds
- Don't stack more than 2 toasts
- Newer toast replaces older

## Color Coding
- LEX: default/white
- SEM: cyan
- SEM*: cyan (asterisk distinguishes hash)
- HYB: magenta

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Status bar shows correct mode
- [ ] Download progress visible during download
- [ ] Toasts appear and auto-dismiss
- [ ] No UI glitches during state changes

## Depends On
- tui.sem.state (State machine)

## References
- Plan: Section 7.4 Status Bar Display","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-19T01:27:07.494875Z","updated_at":"2026-01-05T22:59:36.419263859Z","closed_at":"2026-01-05T18:47:07.187252Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yg2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-vh6q","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:00:37Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2ylfq","title":"Phase 4J: Performance HUD overlay for development","description":"Leverage ftui-extras performance monitoring to add a developer-oriented performance HUD. ftui provides frame timing, render traces, allocation budgets, and conformal predictors. Add a toggleable overlay (F11 or command palette) showing: (1) Frame time (ms) with min/avg/max/p99, (2) Frame rate (fps), (3) Buffer diff stats (cells changed per frame, diff strategy used), (4) Memory usage (heap allocations per frame via AllocationBudget), (5) Search latency (time from keystroke to results displayed), (6) Index stats (document count, index size, last update), (7) Render budget utilization (how much of the frame budget is used). This helps developers optimize cass performance and helps users diagnose slow terminal behavior. The HUD renders as a semi-transparent overlay in the top-right corner using ftui visual_fx backdrop with alpha compositing. Respects the degradation system -- auto-hides at EssentialOnly level.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:21:40.053378653Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:56:58.072061674Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T07:56:58.072037188Z","close_reason":"Merged into 2noh9.4.4 (UI inspector + debug). Frame timing, render budget, memory usage, search latency HUD details merged.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2ylfq","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1p0wb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:42.388614254Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yry7","title":"Task: Cass reranker stage (CPU-only)","description":"## Task
Add an optional reranking step to cass search results using the **CPU-only reranker winner**.

## Blocked On
- xf reranker winner (bd-5fj3)

## Implementation Outline
1. Add `Reranker` trait + adapter
2. Rerank top-N (default 20) after hybrid retrieval
3. Expose `--rerank` flag + config toggle

## Validation & Tests
### Unit tests
- Rerank scores applied and sorted correctly

### Integration tests
- Rerank fixed tiny dataset and verify improved order

### E2E script (detailed logging)
- `scripts/bakeoff/cass_rerank_e2e.sh`
  - Logs latency, NDCG lift

## Acceptance Criteria
- NDCG@10 improvement on cass corpus
- Total rerank latency <100ms for top-20
- Logs archived","notes":"### Optimization review
- If no eligible reranker winner, allow baseline reranker only with explicit opt-in (warn on CLI).
- Ensure reranker stage is **skippable** under daemon overload/memory pressure to keep cass responsive.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-23T21:22:57.785857096Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T15:35:48.077269428Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T15:35:48.077018375Z","close_reason":"Implementation complete: Reranker trait, FastEmbedReranker with ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2, lib.rs integration, CLI flags, 8 tests passing, E2E script ready, graceful degradation. Model download infra is separate task.","external_ref":"bd-2t2d","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yry7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-3c1ix","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:43:49Z","created_by":"import"}],"comments":[{"id":521,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yry7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implemented core reranker infrastructure: reranker.rs trait + fastembed_reranker.rs using ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2. E2E script created at scripts/bakeoff/cass_rerank_e2e.sh. Next: wire --rerank CLI flag and integrate into search pipeline.","created_at":"2026-01-25T06:52:55Z"},{"id":522,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yry7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Integrated reranker into lib.rs search pipeline. When --rerank flag is passed, FastEmbedReranker is loaded and reranks the top-N results using ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2 cross-encoder. Graceful degradation: if model unavailable or rerank fails, original results returned. Waiting for cargo build to verify compilation.","created_at":"2026-01-25T07:38:45Z"},{"id":523,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yry7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implementation complete. Summary:
- Created reranker.rs with Reranker trait and RerankerError types
- Created fastembed_reranker.rs with FastEmbedReranker using ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2
- Integrated reranking into lib.rs search pipeline (after hybrid/lexical/semantic search)
- --rerank and --reranker CLI flags wired and working
- 7 unit tests passing
- E2E script ready at scripts/bakeoff/cass_rerank_e2e.sh
- Graceful degradation: if model unavailable, original results returned
Remaining: Model download infrastructure (separate task) to install reranker model files.","created_at":"2026-01-25T07:54:03Z"},{"id":524,"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2yry7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Fixed empty document bug: added check for empty content/snippet before reranking. If any hit has both empty, gracefully skip reranking instead of failing.","created_at":"2026-01-25T15:28:40Z"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2zc9a","title":"TUI polish: theming, hotkeys, performance","description":"Add dark/light themes, hotkey legend, accessibility tweaks, reduce allocations/redraws for smooth 60fps terminal experience.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-21T01:29:42.892781635Z","updated_at":"2025-11-23T14:34:17.647766052Z","closed_at":"2025-11-23T14:34:17.647766052Z","external_ref":"bd-83a3","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2zc9a","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-6hx.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:43:49Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2zc9a","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-6hx.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:43:49Z","created_by":"import"}]}
